Based on the search results, here's what I found about ElevenLabs Eleven v3 pricing and plan tiers for 2026:

## Eleven v3 Cost Per Character

The cost of generating with Eleven v3 is 1 credit per character.

## ElevenLabs Plan Tiers (2026)

ElevenLabs offers a Free plan with 10,000 characters/month; Starter at $5/month with 30,000 credits; Creator at $11/month with 100,000 credits; Pro at $99/month with 500,000 credits; Scale at $330/month and Business at $1,320/month with millions of credits; plus custom Enterprise plans.

## Credit System & Model Variations

It's important to note that while Eleven v3 costs 1 credit per character, for V2 Flash/Turbo English and V2.5 Flash/Turbo Multilingual models, discounted pricing applies, costing between 0.5 and 1 credit per character depending on your subscription plan.

## Additional Plan Features

Each tier clearly defines how many characters you could use, what models you have access to, and how many voice slots, cloning credits, and dubbing entitlements are included.

Based on the web search results, here's a comparison of the ElevenLabs models and Starter plan access:

## Cost Per Character Comparison

**eleven_turbo_v2_5** - Costs 0.5 credit per character

**eleven_v3** - Costs 1 credit per character

This means eleven_v3 is twice as expensive per character as eleven_turbo_v2_5.

## Model Characteristics

The eleven_turbo_v2_5 and eleven_turbo_v2 models are functionally equivalent to the eleven_flash_v2_5 and eleven_flash_v2 models respectively, except the latency on the Flash models is lower on average. The Flash models are recommended over Turbo models in all use cases.

Eleven v3 is the latest and most advanced speech synthesis model, producing natural, life-like speech with high emotional range and contextual understanding across multiple languages.

## Starter Plan Access

The Starter plan ($5/mo) includes 30k credits, commercial license, instant voice cloning, and access to Studio and Dubbing API. Based on the credit system, both models are accessible through the Starter plan—you would simply get more audio output using eleven_turbo_v2_5 (60k characters) versus eleven_v3 (30k characters) with the same credit allocation.

content.text:
I now have consistent data from multiple ElevenLabs help sources. Here is a precise summary:

---

## ElevenLabs TTS Pricing — Current as of March 2026

### ElevenLabs uses a credit system where 1 credit = 1 character on standard models.

---

### 1. Cost per Character: eleven_turbo_v2_5 vs eleven_v3

| Model | Credits per character | Effective cost on Starter ($5 / 30k credits) |
|---|---|---|
| `eleven_turbo_v2_5` | **0.5 credits/char** | ~60,000 chars per month |
| `eleven_v3` | **1.0 credit/char** | ~30,000 chars per month |

So `eleven_v3` is **2x more expensive** per character than `eleven_turbo_v2_5`. There is no published USD-per-character rate directly — ElevenLabs prices everything in credits, so the dollar cost depends on which plan you're on and its credit-to-dollar ratio.

On the Starter plan: $5 / 30,000 credits = **$0.000167/credit**
- `eleven_turbo_v2_5`: ~$0.0000833/char ($0.083/1,000 chars)
- `eleven_v3`: ~$0.000167/char ($0.167/1,000 chars)

---

### 2. Plan Tiers and Credit Allocations

| Plan | Price/mo | Credits included |
|---|---|---|
| Free | $0 | 10,000 |
| Starter | $5 | 30,000 |
| Creator | $22 | 100,000 |
| Pro | $99 | 500,000 |
| Scale | $330 | ~2,000,000 |
| Business | $1,320 | ~10,000,000 |
| Enterprise | Custom | Custom |

---

### 3. Which Plans Include v3 Access?

**All plans, including Free and Starter, have access to Eleven v3 (Alpha).** Per ElevenLabs' own help docs: "All ElevenLabs users have access to Eleven v3 (Alpha) already — you just need to select Eleven v3 from the model selection menu." There is no plan-tier gate on v3 access; the only difference is how many credits you have to spend.

---

### Important caveat

The `eleven_v3` model is still labeled **Alpha**, which means its pricing and availability could change. The 0.5 credits/char discount for Turbo/Flash v2.5 models applies to all self-serve plans; enterprise plans may be billed differently (0.5–1 credit/char depending on negotiated terms).

---

Sources:
- [How much does it cost to generate using Eleven v3 (Alpha)? – ElevenLabs](https://help.elevenlabs.io/hc/en-us/articles/35869113958801-How-much-does-it-cost-to-generate-using-Eleven-v3-Alpha)
- [How do I get access to Eleven v3 (Alpha)? – ElevenLabs](https://help.elevenlabs.io/hc/en-us/articles/35869066075921-How-do-I-get-access-to-Eleven-v3-Alpha)
- [What are credits? – ElevenLabs](https://help.elevenlabs.io/hc/en-us/articles/27562020846481-What-are-credits)
- [ElevenLabs Pricing](https://elevenlabs.io/pricing)
- [ElevenLabs API Pricing](https://elevenlabs.io/pricing/api)
- [The Complete Guide to ElevenLabs Plans & Usage Based Pricing 2026 – Flexprice](https://flexprice.io/blog/elevenlabs-pricing-breakdown)
